pet.name: Clementine
pet.breedColor: a sandy-orange rabbit with a cream chest and muzzle, tall upright ears, and a rounded, fluffy body

memories.favoriteActivity: doing happy little binky hops across the living-room rug after breakfast
memories.sleepingSpot: the soft hay corner beneath the window
memories.quirks: the way you thump one back foot to let everyone know it is dinnertime
